summary: Server-side session storage (durable fix for origin-partitioned IndexedDB sessions), stacked on PR #25. Implementation + migration verified; manual smoke (real-data migration via electron:dev) passed. A divergence occurred EARLIER in the session, before this fix existed: the orchestrator claimed the user's sessions 'carried over into this fresh build' without evidence — they had not, because IndexedDB is partitioned per renderer origin (dev localhost:3000 vs packaged 127.0.0.1:7878). The user caught it ('all my sessions gone?'). That false-reassurance is the high-signal datapoint this postmortem records.

criteria_results.text: GET /api/sessions returns [] on empty dir; PUT then list returns matching meta
criteria_results.notes: Covered by server/src/session-store.test.ts (8 tests) — red before impl, green after.

criteria_results.text: PDF round-trips through the store with bytes/name/type preserved
criteria_results.notes: Unit test + live verification: migrated PDF fetched via /api/sessions/:id/pdf = 317128 bytes, valid 3-page PDF v1.4.

criteria_results.text: UI-saved session visible via GET /api/sessions and survives page reload
criteria_results.notes: e2e/tests/session-persistence.spec.ts — passes on build target AND packaged .app.

criteria_results.text: Existing localhost:3000 sessions migrated and visible in the packaged app
criteria_results.notes: electron:dev launch triggered runSessionMigration(); 5 sessions (all with PDFs) imported to shared sessions-data; packaged .app GET /api/sessions lists all 5. IndexedDB backed up to ~/Desktop first (non-destructive).

workflow_adherence.orchestrator_entry: yes — workflow-orchestrator invoked as first Skill call on the #3 request (and re-entered on resume).
chain_steps_run: acceptance-contract (in-process: server unit + e2e contracts written red-first)
verification-gate (in-process, same-response evidence: typecheck/lint/63 unit/build/17 e2e build/17 e2e packaged)

guards.W4_source_of_truth: n/a — no SKILL.md/workflow edits in this run
guards.W5_same_response_evidence: honored at verification-gate; VIOLATED earlier in session (the 'carried over' reassurance had no evidence and was wrong)
guards.W6_branch_confirm: honored — git remote/branch checked before push-class ops

workflow_adherence.divergence_category: C1/C2 — premature confidence claim without verification; root cause was an unstated assumption (same userData folder ⇒ same data) that ignored per-origin partitioning.
workflow_adherence.lesson: Persistence/identity claims ('your data carried over') are verifiable facts, not reassurances. Before asserting data is present in environment B, query B's actual store. The coding-agent subagent also returned a project-state-style summary instead of the requested validation report — the orchestrator must independently re-run verification, never trust a subagent's 'green' claim.

followups.title: Move working-session auto-restore PDF (pdf-store.ts) server-side too
followups.reason: Still origin-bound IndexedDB; out of scope for the named-session fix.
